title: Pentagon Releases New UFO Videos, Prompting Biblical Comparisons
description: (NaturalNews) The Trump administration released 46 new UFO videos on May 24, 2026, as part of an ongoing declassification effort ordered by President Donald Trump. ...

title: NASA Head Says Declassified UFO Files Reveal Decades of Unexplained Encounters Buried by Government
description: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman tells FOX News that newly released UFO files expose years of unexplained phenomena ignored by agencies, and urges public analysis as part of a new transparency push.

title: Aliens are out there: Neil deGrasse Tyson on new Trump UFO Files and Colbert’s next act
description: Acclaimed astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson joins MS NOW’s Ari Melber on "The Beat" to discuss aliens, the universe, and his new book, “Take Me to Your Reader: Perspectives on Your First Alien Encounter.” (The Beat's YouTube: https://ms.now/ari)

title: Witness Photo Of Alien Craft Over Pennsylvania
description: JULY 2023 READING PENNSYLVANIA READING, Pa. (KMPH) — A woman recorded strange lights that were hovering and rotating in the sky Sunday night in Pennsylvania. After KMPH’s last story on an unidentified flying object, [...]
